name: Fitzsimons
description_short: Fitzsimons Federal Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution offering checking, savings, auto loans, mortgages, and certificates with competitive rates.
description_long: Fitzsimons Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union operating as a financial cooperative. The institution has been serving members for decades, with one verified member noting over 40 years of membership. As a federal credit union, deposits are insured by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA), providing the same deposit protection as FDIC-insured banks. The organization operates physical branches including an Anschutz Branch and Southlands Branch, alongside digital banking options through their E-Branch and mobile app. The credit union offers a comprehensive range of financial products and services. These include checking accounts, share savings accounts, share certificates (with advertised rates such as 4.00% APY on 7-month certificates), auto loans with refinancing options, mortgage services including purchase and refinance products, home equity lines of credit (HELOC), and fixed equity loans. Their Rapid Refi Mortgage program is marketed with competitive fixed rates and minimal out-of-pocket costs, including options with no closing costs. Auto loan refinancing features cash back rewards or payment skips. The institution provides mobile banking access for 24/7 account management. Fitzsimons distinguishes itself through several member-focused initiatives. The credit union emphasizes competitive rates and low fees as core value propositions. They offer free credit monitoring services and financial educational resources. The institution runs active referral programs offering $100-$125 bonuses for member and loan referrals. As a not-for-profit entity, the credit union explicitly positions itself as supporting local organizations and community members rather than generating shareholder profits. Staff are described as professional and helpful, with personalized service emphasized through appointment scheduling and one-on-one financial planning. The credit union represents a traditional cooperative financial model with demonstrated member loyalty and community focus. However, the website content does not provide specific information about membership eligibility requirements, fee structures, loan qualification criteria, or competitive rate comparisons. As a regional institution based in Colorado, geographic service area limitations may apply.
services: Auto loans and auto loan refinancing
pros: Free credit monitoring services included for members
Competitive Certificate rates advertised at 4.00% APY for 7-month terms
Auto loan refinancing with option for $300 cash back or skip 3 loan payments
Rapid Refi Mortgage program with no closing costs on select products
Member referral bonuses ($100-$125) for account and loan referrals
NCUA deposit insurance protection on all member accounts
24/7 mobile banking access through dedicated mobile app
Free checking account option available to new members
cons: Website does not clearly specify membership eligibility requirements or geographic service area restrictions
Limited transparency on fee structure, loan qualification criteria, or rate comparisons versus competitors
Physical branch access limited to two named locations (Anschutz and Southlands), suggesting limited geographic footprint
No specific loan terms, APR ranges, or product-specific eligibility details disclosed on homepage
best_for: Colorado residents seeking a local, not-for-profit financial institution with personal service
Existing members with 40+ year tenure or strong community ties looking for stability
Borrowers interested in auto loan refinancing with cash incentives or payment relief options
Homeowners seeking mortgage refinancing with minimal closing costs
diagnosis: Fitzsimons is best for Colorado residents or member-eligible individuals seeking traditional credit union services with personalized service, competitive rates, and community reinvestment focus. The main caveat is that membership eligibility requirements and geographic service restrictions are not clearly defined on their website, requiring direct contact to confirm access.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.

meta_description: Fitzsimons — NCUA-insured credit union in AURORA, CO. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
